title: Adversarial Input OpenAI-Compatible
objective: Send hostile-looking XML, HTML/script, template, path traversal, and Unicode control text through OpenClaw's OpenAI-compatible HTTP endpoint and verify OpenClaw treats the text as user content without crashing, stalling, or losing provider routing.

phases.title: Provision Adversarial Input Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw env without starting the gateway yet so Kova auth is applied before the gateway process boots.

phases.title: Start Gateway
phases.intent: Start the gateway after auth/provider config is already present in the OpenClaw home.

phases.title: Hostile Input Corpus
phases.intent: Send a fixed hostile-looking input corpus through the OpenAI-compatible user API and require normal mock-provider responses for every case.
evidence: final assistant marker per hostile input

phases.title: Post-Input Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after hostile-looking input cases.
